        print(f"Purple: pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check player
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 6:
        b = n['boundary']
        min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
        min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"Player: ({min_r}, {min_c})")

# Check blue area size
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'S' and n['pixels'] > 100:
        print(f"Blue area: {n['pixels']} px")
</parameter>

Wait - maybe the player can move vertically if there's a passage. Let me check if there's a passage from the lower blue area to the upper blue area.
